question: Define a `struct Book` with members `title` (`std::string`), `author` (`std::string`), and `publicationYear` (int). Write a program that declares an array of three `Book` structs, prompts the user to enter details for each book, and then prints the details of all books.

test_cases.input:
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Douglas Adams
1979
Pride and Prejudice
Jane Austen
invalid_year
1813
1984
George Orwell
2000
test_cases.expected:
Enter details for three books:

--- Book 1 ---
Enter title: Enter author: Enter publication year: 
--- Book 2 ---
Enter title: Enter author: Enter publication year: Invalid input. Please enter a number for the year.
Enter publication year: 
--- Book 3 ---
Enter title: Enter author: Enter publication year: 

--- Details of all books ---

Book 1:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
Publication Year: 1979

Book 2:
Title: Pride and Prejudice
Author: Jane Austen
Publication Year: 1813

Book 3:
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
Publication Year: 2000
